metaTitle: Wheelchair Taxi to Kempegowda International Airport Bangalore | Click N Start
metaDescription: Pre-book a wheelchair taxi to or from Kempegowda International Airport (BIAL) with Click N Start. Reliable pickup and drop-off with automatic hydraulic lift for safe and comfortable travel.
travelTime: 60-90 mins depending on traffic from Central Bengaluru
description: Travel to and from Kempegowda International Airport with ease using Click N Start. We track flight timings for punctual pickups, and our wheelchair taxis are equipped with automatic hydraulic lifts to handle passengers, luggage, and mobility aids safely and securely.

cta.heading: Need an Airport Transfer?
cta.subheading: Pre-book your wheelchair accessible airport taxi instantly via WhatsApp.

whatsapp.label: Book via WhatsApp
whatsapp.ariaLabel: Book your airport wheelchair taxi via WhatsApp

phone.ariaLabel: Call us to book a wheelchair taxi
